title: Tapping on Fruit
description: *Knock the Fruit* is a casual mini-game belonging to the match-and-eliminate genre. The gameplay mechanics are as follows: set within a 9x9 grid matrix, the core objective is to eliminate adjacent fruits of the same color to meet the target score required for each level. Players can eliminate adjacent fruits—either vertically and horizontally (in Normal Mode) or in all eight directions (in Hammer Mode)—simply by tapping on a fruit.
